title: Pollyanna
review_summary: The reviewer disliked this silent film adaptation for its poor quality compared to both the original material and other versions of "Pollyanna," advising against showing it to children.

title: Anchors Aweigh
director: George Sidney, Joseph Barbera, William Hanna
review_summary: The reviewer praises "Step Lively" for showcasing Frank Sinatra's vocal talents with memorable duets but criticizes it as a bloated project due to unnecessary additions, though acknowledging its status as Sinatra’s finest musically in his decade.
